시편 144:1.content: Blessed be Yahweh, my rock, who teaches my hands to war, and my fingers to battle:

시편 144:2.content: my loving kindness, my fortress, my high tower, my deliverer, my shield, and he in whom I take refuge, who subdues my people under me.

시편 144:3.content: Yahweh, what is man, that you care for him? Or the son of man, that you think of him?

시편 144:4.content: Man is like a breath. His days are like a shadow that passes away.

시편 144:5.content: Part your heavens, Yahweh, and come down. Touch the mountains, and they will smoke.

시편 144:6.content: Throw out lightning, and scatter them. Send out your arrows, and rout them.

시편 144:7.content: Stretch out your hand from above, rescue me, and deliver me out of great waters, out of the hands of foreigners,

시편 144:8.content: whose mouths speak deceit, whose right hand is a right hand of falsehood.

시편 144:9.content: I will sing a new song to you, God. On a ten-stringed lyre, I will sing praises to you.

시편 144:10.content: You are he who gives salvation to kings, who rescues David, his servant, from the deadly sword.

시편 144:11.content: Rescue me, and deliver me out of the hands of foreigners, whose mouths speak deceit, whose right hand is a right hand of falsehood.

시편 144:12.content: Then our sons will be like well-nurtured plants, our daughters like pillars carved to adorn a palace.

시편 144:13.content: Our barns are full, filled with all kinds of provision. Our sheep produce thousands and ten thousands in our fields.

시편 144:14.content: Our oxen will pull heavy loads. There is no breaking in, and no going away, and no outcry in our streets.

시편 144:15.content: Happy are the people who are in such a situation. Happy are the people whose God is Yahweh.
